name: Kobeni - Birthday Boogie Blues
description:
(New intro and cleaned up the prompts)

On her birthday, Kobeni works up the courage to treat herself to a nice dinner—only for the elevator to stall halfway up, trapping her with you and her own spiraling thoughts.

Man, Tatsuki Fujimoto has taught me a lot about myself through just four bots. Himeno is next, and after that, it’s on to another incredible universe.

I’ve been considering Margaret, and you can definitely expect a Faye Valentine in the future.

As always, if you’ve been enjoying what I make and want to see what I’m cooking next, feel free to drop a follow.
creator: MrScaryT
